project.description: Execution of test plan from S3 Jar Files

hudson.model.ChoiceParameterDefinition.name: Plan_Path
hudson.model.ChoiceParameterDefinition.description: Select a path of the Test Plan

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: Test_Plan
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Provide Test Plan name, without .xml extension Note: Suite Name and Test Plan Name should be the same

hudson.model.ChoiceParameterDefinition.name: PublishToDB
hudson.model.ChoiceParameterDefinition.description: Select 'True' if you want the results pushed to DB; leave it 'False' for a dry‑run.

script.script: System.clearProperty("hudson.model.DirectoryBrowserSupport.CSP") System.setProperty("hudson.model.DirectoryBrowserSupport.CSP", "default-src * 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; script-src * 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; connect-src * 'unsafe-inline'; img-src * data: blob: 'unsafe-inline'; frame-src *; style-src * 'unsafe-inline';")

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
echo "Host IP : $(curl http://checkip.amazonaws.com)" # Instance‑ID of the *same* EC2 host INSTANCE_ID=$(curl -s http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/instance-id) echo "Instance ID : $INSTANCE_ID" java --version
# docker info docker-compose --version groups $(whoami) sudo usermod -aG docker $(whoami)
if [[ "$PublishToDB" == "true" ]]; then echo "Killing any previous Spring Boot app instance..." pkill -f ica-test-reporting-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar || true
aws s3 cp s3://ipc-bucket/infor-artifact/com/infor/testautomation/ica-test-reporting/0.0.10/0.0.1-SNAPSHOT/ica-test-reporting-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar .
echo "Starting Spring Boot app in background..." #nohup java -jar ica-test-reporting-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar > springbootApp.log 2>&1 & java -DEC2_INSTANCE_ID="$INSTANCE_ID" -jar ica-test-reporting-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar > springbootApp.log 2>&1 & sleep 5 echo "Spring Boot app started. Running next Java command..." fi

# Present Working Directory pwd # Create required directories mkdir -p OutputData Reports downloads lib lib-pw chmod 777 ./downloads chown ec2-user:ec2-user /home/ec2-user/jenkins_tmp # Sync libraries from S3 aws s3 sync s3://ipc-bucket/lib/ ./lib aws s3 sync s3://ipc-bucket/lib-pw/ ./lib-pw
# Copy helper scripts cp /home/ec2-user/wait-for-containers.sh . cp /home/ec2-user/waitForDockerToBeActive.sh . cp /home/ec2-user/waitForContainerDToBeActive.sh . aws s3 cp s3://ipc-bucket/dockerComposeFiles/waitForGridToBeReady.sh . sudo dos2unix waitForGridToBeReady.sh sudo chmod +x waitForGridToBeReady.sh
# Download docker compose file aws s3 cp s3://ipc-bucket/infor-artifact/com/infor/testautomation/inforTestAutomation/0.0.10/0.0.10/inforTestAutomation-0.0.10.jar ./lib/. #aws s3 cp s3://ipc-bucket/infor-artifact/com/infor/testautomation/inforTestAutomation-pw/0.0.10/0.0.1/inforTestAutomation-pw-0.0.1.jar ./lib-pw/. aws s3 cp s3://ipc-bucket/infor-artifact/com/infor/testautomation/inforTestAutomation-pw/0.0.11/0.0.2/inforTestAutomation-pw-0.0.2.jar ./lib-pw/.
aws s3 cp s3://ipc-bucket/compose7.yml .
branch="$Branch"
# Project-specific artifact logic if [ "$Project" == 'ln-ia-testscripts' ]; then aws s3 cp s3://ipc-bucket/infor-artifact/com/infor/test/ln-ia-testscripts-0.1/newBranch/0.0.1-SNAPSHOT/ln-ia-testscripts-0.1-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar . aws s3 cp s3://ipc-bucket/infor-artifact/com/infor/test/ln-ia-testscripts-0.1/newBranch/0.0.1-SNAPSHOT/pom.xml . jar xf ln-ia-testscripts-0.1-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar fi
if [ "$Project" == 'ln-ia-testscripts-0.2' ]; then aws s3 cp s3://ipc-bucket/infor-artifact/com/infor/test/ln-ia-testscripts-0.2/$branch/0.0.2-SNAPSHOT/ln-ia-testscripts-0.2-0.0.2-SNAPSHOT.jar . aws s3 cp s3://ipc-bucket/infor-artifact/com/infor/test/ln-ia-testscripts-0.2/$branch/0.0.2-SNAPSHOT/pom.xml . jar xf ln-ia-testscripts-0.2-0.0.2-SNAPSHOT.jar fi
if [ "$Project" == 'ln-ia-testscripts-0.3' ]; then aws s3 cp s3://ipc-bucket/infor-artifact/com/infor/test/ln-ia-testscripts-0.3/21.10.2025/0.0.2-SNAPSHOT/ln-ia-testscripts-0.3-0.0.2-SNAPSHOT.jar . aws s3 cp s3://ipc-bucket/infor-artifact/com/infor/test/ln-ia-testscripts-0.3/21.10.2025/0.0.2-SNAPSHOT/pom.xml . jar xf ln-ia-testscripts-0.3-0.0.2-SNAPSHOT.jar fi
if [ "$Project" == 'xylem-testscripts-pw' ]; then aws s3 cp s3://ipc-bucket/infor-artifact/com/infor/test/xylem-testscripts-pw/main/0.0.2-SNAPSHOT/xylem-testscripts-pw-0.0.2-SNAPSHOT.jar . aws s3 cp s3://ipc-bucket/infor-artifact/com/infor/test/xylem-testscripts-pw/main/0.0.2-SNAPSHOT/pom.xml . jar xf xylem-testscripts-pw-0.0.2-SNAPSHOT.jar fi

echo "Restarting containerd..." whoami #sudo systemctl restart containerd sudo systemctl is-active containerd || sudo systemctl start containerd sleep 60 echo "Waiting for containerd to be active..." timeout 180 ./waitForContainerDToBeActive.sh
echo "Restarting Docker..." #sudo systemctl restart docker sudo systemctl is-active docker || sudo systemctl start docker sleep 60 echo "Waiting for Docker to be active..." timeout 180 ./waitForDockerToBeActive.sh
echo "Final status check:" sudo systemctl status docker sudo systemctl status containerd
COMPOSE_FILE="compose7.yml" sudo docker-compose -f "$COMPOSE_FILE" down -v ## Select yml based on the project if [ "$Project" == "ln-ia-testscripts" ] || [ "$Project" == "ln-ia-testscripts-0.2" ]; then # COMPOSE_FILE="dockerCompose2_New.yml" # COMPOSE_FILE="docker-compose-full-distributed-grid-pw-3.yml" EXECUTION_TYPE="SELENIUM" CLASSPATH=".:lib/*" REMOTE="true"
fi
if [ "$Project" == 'ln-ia-testscripts-0.3' ]; then #COMPOSE_FILE="docker-compose-full-distributed-grid-pw-3.yml" EXECUTION_TYPE="PLAYWRIGHT" CLASSPATH=".:lib-pw/*" REMOTE="false" fi
echo "Execution Type : $EXECUTION_TYPE" echo "Classpath : $CLASSPATH"
### Removes the containers that are in exited state & created but not started state. sudo docker ps -a containers=$(docker ps -a -f status=exited -f status=created -q) if [ -n "$containers" ]; then docker rm $containers else echo "No containers to remove." fi
IS_RUNNING=`docker ps -q -f "name=seleniumHub" --no-trunc` if [[ "$IS_RUNNING" == "" ]]; then sudo docker-compose -f "$COMPOSE_FILE" up -d echo "Docker containers are running using $COMPOSE_FILE!!!" else echo "Docker containers are already running!!!" fi sleep 60
sudo docker ps -a ./wait-for-containers.sh ./waitForGridToBeReady.sh
#java -Xlog:gc*:file=./gc.log:time,uptime \ # -DpublishToDB=$PublishToDB \ # -DgenerateDocument=docx \ # -Dremote=$REMOTE \ # -DremoteURL=http://localhost:4444/wd/hub \ # -cp "$CLASSPATH" \ # org.testng.TestNG \ # -suitethreadpoolsize 3 \ # $Plan_Path$Test_Plan.xml # -DgenerateDocument=docx \ # export SELENIUM_REMOTE_URL=http://localhost:4444/wd/hub
SELENIUM_REMOTE_URL=http://localhost:4444 \ java -Xlog:gc*:file=./gc.log:time,uptime \ -DpublishToDB=$PublishToDB \ -Dremote=$REMOTE \ -cp "$CLASSPATH" \ org.testng.TestNG \ $Plan_Path$Test_Plan.xml
echo "Tests Completed" #groupId="$(xml_grep '/project/groupId' pom.xml --text_only | tr '.' '/')" #artifactId="$(xml_grep '/project/artifactId' pom.xml --text_only)" #aws s3 cp Reports/ s3://ipc-bucket/test-reports/$groupId/$artifactId --recursive --exclude "*" --include "*.html" #sudo docker-compose -f "$COMPOSE_FILE" down

email.subject: ${JOB_NAME} : ${BUILD_NUMBER} - $Test_Plan
${JOB_NAME} : ${BUILD_NUMBER} - $Test_Plan

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
free -h echo "Build number: $BUILD_NUMBER" # Instance-ID of the *same* EC2 host INSTANCE_ID=$(curl -s http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/instance-id) echo "Instance ID: $INSTANCE_ID"
COMPOSE_FILE="compose7.yml"
docker-compose -f "$COMPOSE_FILE" logs >> ./log_$INSTANCE_ID.log aws s3 cp ./gc.log s3://ipc-bucket/instancsLogs/$INSTANCE_ID/$BUILD_NUMBER/gcLogs/ aws s3 cp ./log_$INSTANCE_ID.log s3://ipc-bucket/instancsLogs/$INSTANCE_ID/$BUILD_NUMBER/dockerlogs/
if [[ "$PublishToDB" == "true" ]]; then aws s3 cp ./springbootApp.log s3://ipc-bucket/instancsLogs/$INSTANCE_ID/$BUILD_NUMBER/springbootLogs/ aws s3 cp ./S3Log.log s3://ipc-bucket/instancsLogs/$INSTANCE_ID/$BUILD_NUMBER/S3Logs/ fi
groupId="$(xml_grep '/project/groupId' pom.xml --text_only | tr '.' '/')" artifactId="$(xml_grep '/project/artifactId' pom.xml --text_only)" aws s3 cp Reports/ s3://ipc-bucket/test-reports/$groupId/$artifactId --recursive --exclude "*" --include "*.html"
